overview.body: Al-Nabawy is a leading dairy manufacturer specialized in producing high quality dairy products and exporting them worldwide. Our state-of-the-art facilities and commitment to quality ensure every product meets international standards.

about.storyBody: Founded in 2009, Al-Nabawy Dairy Factory has grown from a local producer into an international exporter trusted by importers and distributors across three continents. Our journey is defined by passion for quality, strict adherence to international standards, and a deep respect for the natural origins of every product we make.
about.visionBody: To be the leading dairy exporter from Egypt, recognized globally for product quality, food safety, and reliable supply chains.
about.missionBody: To manufacture and export premium dairy products that meet international quality standards while maintaining competitive pricing and exceptional customer service.
about.capacityBody: Our factory operates with state-of-the-art machinery capable of processing thousands of tons of milk annually.
